chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Jail Appeal No.S-77 & 78 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For order on M.A No.6186/2025 (U/S 561-A Cr.PC) 10.12.2025. Mr.Shoukat Ali Kaka, Advocate for the appellant (s) Mr.Imtiaz Ali Channa, Advocate for applicant/surety Mr.Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G for the State ****** Through listed application in Crl. Jail Appeal No.S-78/ 2023, applicant Shakeel Ahmed, seeks release of the surety as well as original documents of the vehicle. Counsel submits that although at the time of impugned judgment dated 31.03.2023, one of the accused namely Siddique was proclaimed offender. However, subsequently, he was arrested and presently is in prison in confinement. The applicant claims he submitted the documents pertaining to the ownership of the vehicle in question in his name.to the Anti-Terriorism Court, Naushahro Feroze, but the impugned judgment was passed by the learned X-Additional Sessions Judge/Inside Trial Court @ Central Prison, Hyderabad, therefore, the matter stood transferred to the said Court, but the R & Ps are with the High court. Counsel claims application for release of the surety and original documents was allowed by the lower forum, but no copy of such order is available on record. In the circumstances, office to send photostat copy of the R & Ps of the relevant documents pertaining to surety and vehicle to Anti-Terriorism Court, Naushahro Feroze and X- Additional Sessions Judge, Hyderabad/ Inside Trial Court @ Central Prison, Hyderabad with direction to intimate to the High Court, the precise original documents from the R & P which are needed as per the application filed by the applicant before the concerned Court, if any.

Counsel claims application for release of the surety and original documents was allowed by the lower forum, but no copy of such order is available on record. In the circumstances, office to send photostat copy of the R & Ps of the relevant documents pertaining to surety and vehicle to Anti-Terriorism Court, Naushahro Feroze and X- Additional Sessions Judge, Hyderabad/ Inside Trial Court @ Central Prison, Hyderabad with direction to intimate to the High Court, the precise original documents from the R & P which are needed as per the application filed by the applicant before the concerned Court, if any. Office may then forward the said original documents to the concerned Court for further action. This M.A is disposed of in the above terms. Crl. Jail Appeals to come up on 05.01.2026. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
